description: Estimate a Seemingly Unrelated Regressions (SUR) system for the Grunfeld investment model using the 'grunfeld.gdt' dataset, which contains annual data (1935-1954) for General Electric (ge) and Westinghouse (wh). The system should define two equations: 'invest_ge' depending on 'const', 'value_ge', and 'capital_ge'; and 'invest_wh' depending on 'const', 'value_wh', and 'capital_wh'. Save the full estimation output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/sur_results.txt.
